name: Sarah Chen
summary: Results-driven Java Developer with 9 years of experience building scalable, high-performance applications using Spring Boot and microservices architecture. Strong background in designing RESTful APIs, optimizing database interactions, and implementing CI/CD pipelines. Passionate about clean code, test-driven development, and mentoring junior developers.

experience.title: Senior Java Developer
bullets: Designed and developed microservices handling 50,000+ daily transactions using Spring Boot 3 and Java 17
Led migration from monolithic architecture to microservices, reducing deployment time by 70%
Implemented event-driven architecture using Kafka, improving system decoupling and scalability
Optimized PostgreSQL queries and implemented Redis caching, reducing API response times by 45%
Mentored team of 3 junior developers through code reviews and pair programming sessions
Established coding standards and introduced SonarQube for automated code quality checks

experience.title: Java Developer
bullets: Built RESTful APIs serving 100+ endpoints for e-commerce platform with 2M+ users
Developed payment integration module processing €5M+ monthly transactions
Implemented comprehensive test suites achieving 85% code coverage
Collaborated with DevOps team to containerize applications using Docker
Participated in Agile ceremonies and contributed to sprint planning and retrospectives

experience.title: Junior Java Developer
bullets: Developed backend features for SaaS platform using Spring MVC and Hibernate
Created automated data validation pipelines reducing manual processing by 60%
Wrote unit and integration tests using JUnit and Mockito
Participated in code reviews and improved coding practices based on feedback

certifications: Oracle Certified Professional: Java SE 17 Developer (2023)
